creator: moncrg@dominus.ma.ultranet.com
text:
socket++.info is missing a section 
which if present would allow install-info 
to place it in /usr/local/info/dir

Fix: 

add something like this (modeled on make.info) to the info file (src) or patch:
---
INFO-DIR-SECTION Programming & development tools
START-INFO-DIR-ENTRY
* socket++: (socket++.info).	C++ family of socket classes.
END-INFO-DIR-ENTRY
---
and update whatever else need to install-info
